reviews.review_description: Hello if it is okay with you can i make a channel of this game i will even make a trailer  for it!. So its like I'm just a little dev of the game! and btw i have 313 subs! on my channel!

developer_response.body: Hi, you can do whatever you want. Glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description: This is really glitchy hands go into the rocks  when climbing and enemy too.
This is my favorite game so far.  Great job!

reviews.review_title: One of the best Vr games I’ve ever playe
reviews.review_description:
I love playing this game so much, the combat is so fun and being able to grab the npcs and having to hide bodies really adds to the immersion, getting cocky can also bite you in the butt while playing! 

I love this game and you probally will too

10/10

reviews.review_title: Very very good game I highly recommend !
reviews.review_description:
This game is great, several game hours await you! The game is super beautiful and very well worked for an oculus game, this is the best I could play on the oculus. There are several levels that are all different, each level has a different gameplay. The story is really interesting, with a beautiful ending that I let you discover.

I highly recommend this wonderful game. Good game to you.
